caption: A man in a pink tank top and black athletic shorts is in an indoor basketball gymnasium with wooden floors, blue padded walls, and blue bleachers. In the beginning, he is positioned on the court, dribbling a basketball. As the sequence progresses, he throws the ball high into the air and moves toward the center of the gym. He eventually catches the ball and walks closer to the camera. The setting includes a basketball hoop with a white backboard and a red rim. The court has green and yellow painted lines. There is no visible on-screen text or logos. The scene transitions from a wide shot of the man practicing on the court to a closer shot as he approaches the camera, holding the basketball.
